title: Global Ayyappa Sangamam: Kerala High Court asks auditor of TDB to suggest safeguards against financial irregularities
description: The Kerala High Court on Thursday directed Travancore Devaswom Board (TDB)'s auditor to suggest measures that could help identify and rectify the financial inconsistencies in the board's accounts with respect to the 'Global Ayyappa Sangamam' event. [Suo Motu v State of Kerala & anr]A Division Bench of Justices Raja Vijayaraghavan V and KV Jayakumar examined the audit report placed before it by the Sabarimala Special Commissioner in relation to the Agola Ayyappa Sangamam or the Global Co
